problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE guarantee statements reference port names as both left-hand and right-hand sides without proper input/output relationship definition
problems.minimal_edit: Replace each guarantee with a valid AGREE expression that defines the relationship between the output port and an input port or constant, using only visible identifiers

executor_steps: Identify that the current AGREE annex in GYRO_SUB_wrapper is incorrectly defining guarantees using port names on both sides of equality
Replace each guarantee with a valid AGREE expression that properly relates the output port to an input port or constant
Ensure that the new expressions use only visible identifiers from the component type scope
Remove the invalid self-referential guarantees that cause the validator diagnostics
